comment: Feature directories under apps/desktop/src/features/ that are components/overlays, NOT navigable screens — exempt from the ROUTES-manifest closure in tools/check-route-manifest.mjs. Every entry must be {"name": string, "reason": non-empty string}; an entry without a reviewed reason is a gate bypass. Screens NEVER belong here — register them in apps/desktop/src/routes.ts so the states/a11y e2e suites cover them.

allow.name: connection
allow.reason: header status indicator rendered inside every screen's banner — not a navigable screen; covered by a11y.spec.ts and degraded-network.spec.ts

allow.name: palette
allow.reason: mod+k command palette overlay reachable from every screen — its modal dialog surface is covered by a11y.spec.ts (trap/restore) and App.test.tsx

allow.name: shortcuts
allow.reason: mod+/ shortcuts overlay — registry-driven modal dialog covered by a11y.spec.ts (trap/restore) and App.test.tsx
